The platform

One platform. Your entire QMS.

MyComplianceBase™ combines document control, CAPA management, audit workflows and live compliance tracking in a single workspace, so the evidence you create every day automatically becomes your compliance record.

01

Document library

Version-controlled SOPs and procedures with approval workflows, electronic sign-off and automatic review scheduling.

02

Live compliance tracker

Clause-by-clause progress across every active standard. Each clause links directly to the documents and evidence satisfying it.

03

NCR & CAPA management

Full non-conformance and corrective action workflow — from root cause through evidence upload, verification and closure.

04

Audit management

Internal and external audit scheduling, finding recording and action tracking — all linked to your CAPA system.

app.mycompliancebase.io/compliance
Meet Reggie
R

Your AI compliance assistant.

Knows your documents. Knows your standards. Knows your gaps.

Reggie is the intelligence layer woven through every part of the platform. He is not a generic chatbot, he has full context of your document library, compliance record, open CAPAs and clause requirements.

Reggie assists and drafts, humans approve. All suggestions require sign-off before affecting compliance records.
📄

Document mapping

Upload a SOP and Reggie maps it to clauses across all your active standards automatically. No manual tagging.

📈

Gap analysis

Ask what is stopping you reaching 80% on ISO 27001. Reggie reviews your evidence and prioritises your gaps.

🔧

CAPA drafting

Log a non-conformance and Reggie drafts corrective action text for your team to review and approve.

🔗

Cross-standard intel

Reggie finds where one standard's controls also satisfy another — cutting duplicated compliance work.

Standards covered

Multi-standard from day one.

The only platform tracking ISO 13485, 27001, 9001 and 42001 simultaneously, with cross-standard intelligence built in.

my13485
ISO 13485
Medical device quality management. Design control, production, CAPA and post-market surveillance.
my27001
ISO/IEC 27001
Information security management. 93 controls mapped, ISMS documentation and audit trails built in.
my9001
ISO 9001
Quality management systems. Process management, customer focus and continual improvement.
my42001
ISO 42001
AI management systems. Published December 2023 — for companies developing AI in regulated environments.
